name: G-4 migrate-rubric: namespace routing splits provenance[0].source on '-' so google-tsguide lands under google/tsguide.yaml
command:
mkdir -p root/rubric && printf 'rules:
  - id: g-google-001
    provenance:
      - source: google-tsguide
' > root/rubric/RUBRIC.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/scripts/migrate-rubric-to-source-folders.sh" --root "$PWD/root" --emit-tree "$PWD/out" 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 0 ] && [ -f out/google/tsguide.yaml ] && echo routed 1>&2
